message.content:
Update 20 JIRA tickets. Cloud ID: 1ad24543-cd69-4ee1-82fc-d6a43602b380

For each ticket below:
1. Set parent to RECO-36
2. Update description with the corrected text provided (proper markdown, no literal 
)

Use editJiraIssue with fields like: {"parent": {"key": "RECO-36"}, "description": "the new description"}

Do them in parallel batches of 10.

content.text: I'll update all 20 JIRA tickets in two parallel batches of 10. Let me start with the first batch.

content.text:
The `editJiraIssue` tool permission was denied. I need your approval to use this tool to update the JIRA tickets.

I was trying to call `editJiraIssue` for all 20 tickets (RECO-628 through RECO-647) on cloud ID `1ad24543-cd69-4ee1-82fc-d6a43602b380`. Each call sets:
- **parent** to `{"key": "RECO-36"}`
- **description** to the corrected markdown text you provided

Could you grant permission for the `editJiraIssue` tool so I can proceed with updating all 20 tickets? Once allowed, I will re-run both batches of 10 in parallel.
